mapper.insert:
SELECT APP_USER_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APP_USERS ( ID, USERNAME, FULL_NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, STATUS, PASSWORD, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fullName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_USERS SET USERNAME = #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FULL_NAME = #{fullName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMAIL = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PHONE = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PASSWORD = #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE = #{role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APP_USERS WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
